title: Origins: RED40
description: An origin that loves drinking blood and eating RED.
body:
# 🔴 RED40 **(Impact 3 Origin)** *Pools of blood coat the world; ichor spilled by in search of RED.* ## • Powerlist •
🧊﻿ Rotate: Primary Ability Your arm can be swung once before it has to be rewound.
Info Your attacks are amplified by 1.25.
🩸﻿ RED You crave all things RED, gain it by landing attacks on entities or in smaller doses by consuming red dye.
Info You move at triple speed, and your hunger won't deplete while your body is running on RED, but you will lose you increased speed when you rewind your arm. You will be granted red dye upon waking up.
🔼 Going Rewinding your arm in the air shoots you backwards.
😵 Rotten Your body loses hunger at twice the rate, but you can eat rotten flesh with far more benefit.
🥩 Aching Rewinding your arm briefly regenerates you and depletes hunger.
❤️ Hunger Landing attacks on entities feeds your hunger first, and only generates RED after you are at full hunger.
Info Similar to hunger, RED only depletes when you move.
💢 Broken Your body cannot naturally regenerate, instead regenerating in bursts while you have RED.
Info Taking hits extensively exhausts you, depleting your RED first.
## • Additional • Icon by Arti, inspired by the weird obsession I had with red dye back in 2022!
